feature/issue-60-delegate-quorum-slot-co.task_description: Implement Tier 0 policy interface and Tier 1 River bandit layer for routing authority ladder in selectSlot
feature/issue-60-delegate-quorum-slot-co.approach: Refactor selectSlot() to use a pluggable policy interface with PresetPolicy as Tier 0 default, add reward recording to JSON-lines, then implement River-style contextual bandit as Tier 1 with shadow mode and evidence-based promotion gates.
out_of_scope: Multi-armed bandit exploration strategies (Thompson sampling, UCB)
feature/issue-60-delegate-quorum-slot-co.risk_reason: Isolated to bin/ directory: 2 new modules + 1 existing function modification + tests
